creator: empty.japan
caption:
You have been warned! You won’t be able to stop taking photos in this restaurant.

Serving several courses of what can be described as an Italian-Japanese fusion, the flavor and beauty of each dish in @arancino.kyoto is mind-blowing 😍

Located in the heart of Kyoto, right next to the Takase River, an extremely important Kyoto landmark that was used for transporting goods from the Edo period for over 300 years.

Location:
Kyoto, Nakagyo Ward, Ichinofunairicho, 537-9
